title: Social Security Act 2018 — New Zealand
description: Primary legislation governing social security assistance in New Zealand, including benefit eligibility, rates, beneficiary obligations, and administration by the Ministry of Social Development. Establishes legal framework for jobseeker support, sole parent support, supported living payments, and various allowances.

source.page_title: Social Security Act 2018 | New Zealand Legislation

change_log.author: auto-generated
change_log.change_summary: Initial creation of guardrail for Social Security Act 2018, establishing primary legislative framework for social security benefits and administration in New Zealand.
